option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
auth_enabled: false
server: http_listen_port: 3100 grpc_listen_port: 9096
common: path_prefix: /loki storage: filesystem: chunks_directory: /loki/chunks rules_directory: /loki/rules replication_factor: 1 ring: instance_addr: 127.0.0.1 kvstore: store: inmemory
schema_config: configs: - from: 2020-10-24 store: boltdb-shipper object_store: filesystem schema: v11 index: prefix: index_ period: 24h
ruler: alertmanager_url: http://localhost:9093
# By default, Loki will send anonymous, but uniquely-identifiable usage and configuration # analytics to Grafana Labs. These statistics are sent to https://stats.grafana.org/ # Statistics help us better understand how Loki is used, and they show us performance # levels for most users. This helps us prioritize features and documentation. # For more information on what's sent, look at # https://github.com/grafana/loki/blob/main/pkg/usagestats/stats.go # Refer to the buildReport method to see what goes into a report. # # If you would like to disable reporting, uncomment the following lines: #analytics: # reporting_enabled: false

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
services: keycloak: image: quay.io/keycloak/keycloak:24.0.4 container_name: Keycloak.IDP command: start-dev --import-realm environment: - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN=admin - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin ports: - "8080:8080" volumes: - ./.containers/identity:/opt/keycloak/data - ./.files:/opt/keycloak/data/import networks: - otel
aspire.dashboard: image: mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/nightly/aspire-dashboard:latest container_name: Aspire.Dashboard environment: - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development - ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS=true ports: - "18888:18888" - "4317:18889" networks: - otel
jaeger: image: jaegertracing/jaeger:${JAEGER_VERSION:-latest} container_name: Jaeger restart: always environment: - OTEL_ENABLED=true volumes: - "./jaeger-ui.json:/etc/jaeger/jaeger-ui.json" - "./config.yml:/etc/jaeger/config.yml" command: [ "--config", "/etc/jaeger/config.yml" ] ports: - "0.0.0.0:16686:16686" - "0.0.0.0:8888:8888" - "0.0.0.0:8889:8889" - "0.0.0.0:14317:4317" # OTLP gRPC - Changed from 4317:4317 to 14317:4317 - "0.0.0.0:14318:4318" # OTLP HTTP - Changed from 4318:4318 to 14318:4318 networks: - otel - backend
prometheus: image: prom/prometheus:v3.1.0 container_name: Prometheus restart: always volumes: - "./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml" ports: - "9090:9090" networks: - backend
grafana: image: grafana/grafana:latest container_name: Grafana restart: unless-stopped ports: - "3000:3000" environment: - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin depends_on: - prometheus networks: - backend
loki: image: grafana/loki:latest container_name: Loki ports: - "3100:3100" command: -config.file=/etc/loki/local-config.yaml volumes: - ./.containers/loki:/etc/loki networks: - backend
networks: otel: driver: bridge backend: driver: bridge

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
services: keycloak: image: quay.io/keycloak/keycloak:24.0.4 container_name: Keycloak.IDP command: start-dev --import-realm environment: - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN=admin - KEYCLOAK_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin ports: - "8080:8080" volumes: - ./.containers/identity:/opt/keycloak/data - ./.files:/opt/keycloak/data/import networks: - otel
aspire.dashboard: image: mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/nightly/aspire-dashboard:latest container_name: Aspire.Dashboard environment: - ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development - ASPIRE_DASHBOARD_UNSECURED_ALLOW_ANONYMOUS=true ports: - "18888:18888" - "4317:18889" networks: - otel
jaeger: image: jaegertracing/jaeger:${JAEGER_VERSION:-latest} container_name: Jaeger restart: always environment: - OTEL_ENABLED=true volumes: - "./jaeger-ui.json:/etc/jaeger/jaeger-ui.json" - "./config.yml:/etc/jaeger/config.yml" command: [ "--config", "/etc/jaeger/config.yml" ] ports: - "0.0.0.0:16686:16686" - "0.0.0.0:8888:8888" - "0.0.0.0:8889:8889" - "0.0.0.0:14317:4317" # OTLP gRPC - Changed from 4317:4317 to 14317:4317 - "0.0.0.0:14318:4318" # OTLP HTTP - Changed from 4318:4318 to 14318:4318 networks: - otel - backend
prometheus: image: prom/prometheus:v3.1.0 container_name: Prometheus restart: always volumes: - "./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml" ports: - "9090:9090" networks: - backend
grafana: image: grafana/grafana:latest container_name: Grafana restart: unless-stopped ports: - "3000:3000" environment: - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin volumes: - ./.containers/grafana:/var/lib/grafana depends_on: - prometheus - loki networks: - backend
loki: image: grafana/loki:latest container_name: Loki ports: - "3100:3100" command: -config.file=/etc/loki/local-config.yaml volumes: - ./.containers/loki:/etc/loki networks: - backend
networks: otel: driver: bridge backend: driver: bridge

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
